story.text: The artefacts are the **items of the universe** — everything forged at a vertex of the 64-vertex sovereignty lattice (Z/(2⁶)Z, 96 edges, toroidal). Each artefact is a configuration across six dimensions, a 6-bit blade.

## The six dimensions

| Bit | Dimension | Yang (1) | Yin (0) |
|---|---|---|---|
| d₁ | 🛡️ Protection | Boundary forged | Exposure permitted |
| d₂ | 🤝 Delegation | Agency transferred | Retained locally |
| d₃ | 📜 Memory | State accumulated | Stateless |
| d₄ | 🔗 Connection | Multi-party active | Isolated |
| d₅ | ⚡ Computation | ZK proof active | Direct revelation |
| d₆ | 💎 Value | Economic flow | Non-transactional |

## The first 63

**The first 63 are here** — one artefact per vertex (the 64 − 1; vertex 0 is [the Null Blade](#), where all forging begins). **15 are named** because they were forged and walked — their names arrived from the experience, not assigned upfront. The rest are the **open frontier** (the *Quest of the Unnamed Faces*): each gets named when someone forges it at [spellweb.ai](https://spellweb.ai) and discovers what that configuration feels like.

## How the wiki grows

This is the long-term sync model. The [[The Workshops]] assign forged items to vertices as **trust tasks** are completed — a Sovereign walks a workshop's constellation, forges an artefact, and it takes its place at a vertex here. The reference sheet shows the gap; the forge fills it. *The forge doesn't care how you struck the metal — only what blade you hold.*
